data.body:
## Description

Remove all v2 tk/TK references from 6 utility scripts missed in the original implementation plan. Replace $TK calls with ticket CLI equivalents.

## Scripts to modify
1. issue-quality-check.sh — replace $TK show with .claude/scripts/dso ticket show
2. check-acceptance-criteria.sh — replace $TK show with .claude/scripts/dso ticket show
3. issue-summary.sh — replace $TK show/list with ticket equivalents
4. issue-batch.sh — replace $TK calls with ticket equivalents
5. release-debug-lock.sh — replace $TK calls with ticket equivalents
6. qualify-ticket-refs.sh — replace tk references with ticket equivalents

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No script contains TK= variable assignment
  Verify: { grep -l '^TK=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/issue-quality-check.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-acceptance-criteria.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/issue-summary.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/issue-batch.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/release-debug-lock.sh $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/qualify-ticket-refs.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] RED tests from 8385-dd5b now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh

## Files Modified
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-quality-check.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-acceptance-criteria.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-summary.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-batch.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/release-debug-lock.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/qualify-ticket-refs.sh
